specific_question: What percentage of MediConn’s virtual healthcare platform’s API end points were encrypted under Brian Smith’s security configuration project completed by March 1, 2025?
answer: According to the end of project internal report, Brian Smith ensured that 98% of MediConn’s virtual healthcare platform’s API endpoints were encrypted under the March 1, 2025 configuration project.
dr_question: In 2026, how can MediConn Solutions defend its virtual healthcare platform against coordinated ransomware attacks facilitated by foreign nation-state cyber threat actors, ensuring uninterrupted access to clinical systems and patient safety?
